**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Faurecia Automotive Parts (Foshan) Co., Ltd. is a wholly foreign-owned enterprise (WFOE) and a strategic manufacturing node within the global FORVIA (formerly Faurecia) Group. Its USCC (91310000) indicates an original registration in Shanghai as 'Faurecia Exhaust System (Shanghai)'. The relocation to Sanshui District, Foshan (Guangdong Province) reflects a strategic move to serve major automotive OEMs in the Pearl River Delta (e.g., FAW-Volkswagen, GAC). With a fully paid-in capital of 15M RMB and 142 insured employees, it is an active, heavy-asset tier-1 manufacturing plant specializing in the design, assembly, and production of automotive exhaust systems and related components. The transition of email domains from '@faurecia.com' to '@forvia.com' confirms its integration into the newly formed FORVIA entity (the merger of Faurecia and Hella).

Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 70)
